englishDefinitions: To claim praise or responsibility for something, especially for something good that was done.
persianTranslation: اعتبارِ چیزی را به نام خود زدن
ادعای سهم داشتن در کاری کردن
برای کاری که انجام شده، اعتبار گرفتن
examples: He tried to take credit for my idea.
The manager took credit for the team's success.
Don't take credit for work you didn't do.
